content: Always run kubectl diff before kubectl apply to preview changes
Use --dry-run=server for validation — client-side dry-run doesn't catch admission webhook rejections
Never store secrets in plain ConfigMaps. Use SealedSecrets, ExternalSecrets, or Vault CSI driver
Set PodDisruptionBudgets for all production workloads before performing node maintenance
Check pod events (kubectl describe) before checking logs — scheduling failures and OOMKills surface in events first
CoreDNS resolution failures often indicate kube-proxy or iptables rule corruption — check kube-proxy pods and conntrack table
Always use --atomic with helm upgrade in CI — it auto-rollbacks on failure instead of leaving a broken release
cert-manager certificates should be renewed 30 days before expiry. Check Certificate resources with kubectl get cert -A for readiness
